title:
Cafe Stoplight

A newsletter by Cozy Concierge
main_content:
Spoils of Gwar

Life roils onward in the imperial core. Aw, I'm just kiddin'! Nothing matters except comics. Have you bought any new stationery? I'd like to do something with my life other than go shopping at Daiso but lemme tell ya, it really does the trick.

---

Spacy Film of the Week

Take the DART on the Red Line to Tyler Station to see Parsimonious at Spacy microcinema. Screens March 27 at 7:30 pm. Check the Spacy calendar at https://www.spacydtx.com

---

More happenings around town...
